task_completion.description: Verify the three required entities are present in the diagram.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Shapes containing the exact text 'Mobile App', 'IoT Cloud Platform', and 'Smart Thermostat' visible in the EdrawMax canvas.

task_completion.description: Verify there are two-way data flows connecting the external entities to the cloud platform.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Connector lines with arrows on both ends (or two separate directional arrows) connecting the 'Mobile App' shape to the 'IoT Cloud Platform' shape, and the 'Smart Thermostat' shape to the 'IoT Cloud Platform' shape.

task_completion.description: Verify a trust boundary encloses only the IoT Cloud Platform.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A boundary box, dashed line, or explicit trust boundary shape that surrounds the 'IoT Cloud Platform' shape but clearly excludes the 'Mobile App' and 'Smart Thermostat' shapes.

task_completion.description: Verify the connections are annotated with the required STRIDE threats.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Spoofing' placed on or near the connection line for the Mobile App, and the text 'Tampering' placed on or near the connection line for the Smart Thermostat.

task_completion.description: Verify the diagram is saved as an EDDX file in the correct directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The EdrawMax title bar showing 'threat_model.eddx', a save dialog confirming the path '/home/ga/Documents/threat_model.eddx', or a file manager window showing the file in the Documents folder.

task_completion.description: Verify the diagram is exported as a PNG file in the correct directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An export success dialog, a file manager showing 'threat_model.png' in '/home/ga/Documents', or the exported image opened in an image viewer.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the EdrawMax application to create the diagram.
integrity.visual_evidence: The EdrawMax interface with its toolbars, shape libraries, and canvas should be visible in the screenshots.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually constructed a diagram rather than just typing text.
integrity.visual_evidence: Presence of actual diagram shapes (e.g., rectangles, circles, threat modeling stencils) and connector lines, rather than just raw text floating on a blank page.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use the terminal to simply create empty files with the target names.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of terminal windows showing commands like 'touch /home/ga/Documents/threat_model.eddx' or 'touch /home/ga/Documents/threat_model.png'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating a diagram with specific text labels: 'Mobile App', 'IoT Cloud Platform', 'Smart Thermostat', 'Spoofing', and 'Tampering'. The final outputs must be saved as 'threat_model.eddx' and exported as 'threat_model.png' in the '/home/ga/Documents' directory.
